name: dishonest-code-audit
description: Find code that lies to users across JS/TS, Python, Go, Rust, and Ruby. Ships two skills: dishonest-code-audit (meta-orchestrator that runs both audits in parallel and aggregates) and stub-audit (standalone mock/stub/placeholder auditor with pluggable stack and framework profiles). Requires pr-review-toolkit installed separately for the silent-failure half.
